2152200.name: Roxy Raccoon's Pinball Panic - Space Spectacular
2152200.description:
2 Brand New Tables with online leaderboards and unlockable cosmetics!

Space themed tables with multiple playfields.

Future Flight

  • Standard sized table with 1 upper playfield.
  • 4 Flippers, 2 Slingshots, 5 Bumpers, 10 Drop Targets, 9 Rollovers, 7 Teleporter Holes, 1 Raceway.
  • Ball Saver, Score Multiplier.

Golden Galaxy

  • Ultra-Wide table with 1 upper playfield
  • 5 Flippers, 3 Slingshots, 5 Bumpers, 11 Spinners, 4 Rollovers, 3 Drop Targets, 1 Teleporter Hole, 1 Raceway.
  • Ball Saver, Score Multiplier, Kickback.

Cosmetics

  • Space Mine: 1 new playable character (the ball handles the same, differences are visual only).
  • 6 Space themed accessories.
  • 6 Furs, appropriate for travelling the galaxy.
2152200.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语, 德语, 波兰语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲, 土耳其语, 意大利语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
